title: Neil Baker
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Baker}}
'''Neil Baker''' wrote the backstory of the [[Recon-PK series droid]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. His alias was ''nob01'' on [[StarWars.com]].
